summary: Penalty direction fix and field view elements verified - All tests PASSED. Defensive penalties now correctly move ball FORWARD and offensive penalties move ball BACKWARD, accounting for which team has possession.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all penalty direction and field view tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Penalty direction fix is working correctly. The fix in calculatePenaltyEnforcement() in penaltyCatalog.js (lines 1181-1192) now properly accounts for possession when determining penalty direction. Field view elements (LOS, first down line, hash marks) are all visible and working.

penalty_defensive_home_possession.description: Defensive Holding (5 yards) with home possession: Ball moved from TES 25 to TES 30 (FORWARD toward position 100)

penalty_offensive_home_possession.description: Offensive Holding (10 yards) with home possession: Ball moved from TES 30 to TES 20 (BACKWARD toward position 0)

penalty_defensive_away_possession.description: Offsides (5 yards) with away possession: Ball moved from TES 20 to TES 15 (FORWARD toward position 0)
penalty_defensive_away_possession.expected: Ball moves FORWARD (toward position 0 for away team)

field_view_line_of_scrimmage.description: Blue Line of Scrimmage (LOS) visible at ball position with 'LOS' label

field_view_first_down_line.description: Yellow First Down Line visible with '1st' label

field_view_hash_marks.description: Hash marks visible on top and bottom sidelines (180 elements found)

field_view_yard_lines.description: Yard line numbers visible (18 elements found)

field_view_end_zones.description: End zones visible with team colors and names

test_flow: 4. Verified field view elements (LOS, first down line, hash marks)
5. Applied Defensive Holding penalty with home possession - ball moved FORWARD (25 -> 30)
6. Applied Offensive Holding penalty with home possession - ball moved BACKWARD (30 -> 20)
8. Applied Offsides penalty with away possession - ball moved FORWARD (20 -> 15)

code_changes_verified.calculatePenaltyEnforcement: Lines 1181-1192 in penaltyCatalog.js: Direction now accounts for possession - home team goes 0→100, away team goes 100→0
